title: Overview - DrumComputer Tutorial
description:
In this video series, Tom Cosm takes a journey through the features of DrumComputer - the new feature packed beat synthesis and programming machine.

Download Demo here:
https://sugar-bytes.de/drumcomputer
transcript: [Music] sugar bites drum computer is a feature pack to preach synthesis in programming machine 3 drums specific synthesis styles combined with powerful modulation and effects make a comprehensive and cutting-edge sound engine to produce a wide array of unique drum hits these hits can be used in the clever beat programming and sequencing engine with various pattern generation tools and uniquely human randomization features the synth engine brings an interesting twist to drum synthesis due to a combination of the specialized capabilities of the three sound generation areas we have an 808 inspired engine a wavetable engine and a suave recent engine that liquidizer sounds to produce realistic in harmonic greens and Tails something other drum machines lack whether you're totally new or an experienced sound designer the make kit button gives you instant gratification by quickly generating random new sounds for each of the eight slots based on profiles that you define alternatively you can just randomize specific drum hits at your choosing the sequencer is packed with exclusive features that make creating beats a breeze such as global pattern randomizer which creates useful patterns based on probability meaning petals evolve rather than drastically change each time we have a remix autofill feature and many file drag-and-drop capabilities which includes sequencer data mapped to fix CC values we can customize the zoning of the drum patterns mutes and individual drum hits even assigning keys between hits as pitch modifiers or track rolls as well as the three layered synth engine we have the usual in-depth modulation control that sugar bytes always bring to the table with envelopes lfos a modulation matrix and an area where we can see all of our sounds together and adjust things such as all sounds envelope times with Bipolar control the master channel has additional sound character tools with a transient shaper compression maximization and saturation the mexican lets us control our usual plus additional send return options for two different types of reverb finally is the advanced connectivity allowing you free and easy MIDI assignment to or from external places such as other drum sequences or controllers there is also the ability to have individual drum heads leave the plug-in to separate audio channels in your da W so that is drum computer in a nutshell I'm sure you can see how once again sugar bytes have taken a traditional must-have tool for producers and edit their own twists and kinks to produce a powerhouse machine check out the following videos where we get more in-depth and creative with the features explaining what everything does in detail starting off with a breakdown of the synth engine and how it works together [Applause]
